name: Labdhara Gosht- Smothered Lamb (or Pork or Beef) - India
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boned shoulder of lamb, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 inch piece fresh ginger root, finely chopped
1/2 cup fresh cilantro leaves, finely chopped
2 fresh hot green chilies, seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix all ingredients except oil, garlic, and black pepper.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a pressure cooker over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add garlic and stir until the pieces turn medium brown.
4. Add the seasoned meat to the pressure cooker and stir once or twice.
5. Reduce heat to medium. Cover the pressure cooker tightly and bring it up to full pressure slowly.
6. Cook lamb for 15 minutes, pork for 15 minutes, and beef for 20 minutes at full pressure.
7. Remove the pressure quickly by running cool water over the lid.
8. Uncover the pot and cook over high heat, stirring gently until the sauce thickens.
9. Add black pepper and stir to combine.
